Scene_1_Home_Alone_Computer.A. Why Text: need to focus on work when working
Scene_1_Home_Alone_Computer.A. Why Timing Text: need to focus on work when working

Scene_1_Home_Alone_Computer.A. Why Text: Again, being focussed I would prefer to not be notified.
if it was urgent enough they'd call so my notifications stay off - it'd be super disruptive.

Scene_7_Team_Meeting.B. Why Text: it's unprofessional and distracting to get notifications during a meeting when i am supposed to be actively listening
Scene_7_Team_Meeting.B. Why Timing Text: need to focus on meeting during a meeting

Scene_7_Team_Meeting.B. Why Text: When I am in a work meeting, I do not want to be disturbed - if there were an emergency, I know that Lilly would call me, but a simple private message has to wait until I have some time after the meeting.
Scene_7_Team_Meeting.B. Why Timing Text: After the meeting is over and I have maybe done some short follow-up tasks and have a little time to sit down and check my phone, I would prefer a brief reminder that I do have some new messages. Generally, in this context I think that I would not even need a notification via the smart glasses because I would see the pop up on my phone screen.

Scene_7_Team_Meeting.B. Why Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message
Scene_7_Team_Meeting.B. Why Timing Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message

Scene_7_Team_Meeting.B. Why Text: Even with nobody knowing I get a text, it still feels disruptive to the thing I am doing. I do not need to multitask everywhere, especially in social settings.
Scene_7_Team_Meeting.B. Why Timing Text: I see no reasoning for audio messages in general.

Scene_2_Home_Music.C. Why Text: if there's really an urgent and important scenario, the friend/family can call me instead of dropping a message. i don't like being held hostage to message notifications on my phone
Scene_2_Home_Music.C. Why Timing Text: we don't need to be slaves to our phones. i think you need to stop doing needless research that encourages that behaviour.

Scene_2_Home_Music.Raw_Timing_Choice: When I switch from relaxing to another task (e.g. tidying room). Music continues.
Scene_2_Home_Music.C. Why Text: if im trying to relax, the first option was least annoying
Scene_2_Home_Music.C. Why Timing Text: if im trying to relax, i dont want to be disturbed by any. Whem im done, the one with most info is the most convenient one

Scene_2_Home_Music.C. Why Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message
Scene_2_Home_Music.C. Why Timing Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message

Scene_9_Tent.D. Why Text: If it is important, I want to know what the matter is, instantly. However, maybe my friends say something to me that I cant understand because of the full whatsapp reading notification.
Scene_9_Tent.D. Why Timing Text: If it is important, I want to know what the matter is, instantly. In this occasion, personally, I don't feel like it distracts me if its only the notification with the person's name.

Scene_9_Tent.D. Why Text: Just the right amount of information in the notification. Long text reading disupts too much. (Version 3)
Scene_9_Tent.D. Why Timing Text: When I have time to listen, I might as well listen to the whole message.

Scene_9_Tent.D. Why Text: Die Musik würde mich dermaßen stören und sensibilisieren, wenn dann auch noch ein Ton einer Nachricht ertönt... schrecklich.
I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message
Scene_9_Tent.D. Why Timing Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message

Scene_6_Cycle_City.E. Why Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message
Scene_6_Cycle_City.E. Why Timing Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message.

Scene_5_Grocery_Shopping.F. Why Text: I would be overwhelmed by the two spoken sounds overlapping at the same time when I am also thinking about what to get at the store and my hands are full on top of that.
Scene_5_Grocery_Shopping.F. Why Timing Text: Since the notification is still important, I wand to recieve it and I will need the info also completely (that is I want to know what she wrote).

Scene_5_Grocery_Shopping.F. Why Text: Version 1 war relativ schwer zu bemerken (es hätte sich auch um einen Signalton der Supermarktes handeln können, etwa vor einer Durchsage oder wenn eine Kasse schließt/öffnet). Trotzdem fand ich sie am besten, weil sie so dezent war, dass ich die Lautsprecherdurchsage noch vollständig verstanden habe. Bei Version 2 habe ich die Mitte der Durchsage, bei Version 3 sowohl die Mitte als auch den Schluss der Durchsage überhaupt nicht verstanden. Dies hätte mich womöglich geärgert, wenn die Durchsage für mich interessant gewesen wäre.
Scene_5_Grocery_Shopping.F. Why Timing Text: Während des Einkaufs bin ich nicht so konzentriert, dass ich durch eine ausführlichere Benachrichtigung (Version 3) besonders abgelenkt wäre. Weil ich beide Hände voll habe, wäre es auch besonders bequem, wenn die Nachricht vorgelesen würde. Dann könnte ich entscheiden, ob die Nachricht so dringend und wichtig ist, dass ich die Einkaufstüten kurz abstellen sollte. Version 1 und 2 sind wiederum zu wenig informativ; Version 1 würde bei den Hintergrundgeräuschen möglicherweise sogar ganz untergehen.

Scene_5_Grocery_Shopping.F. Why Text: Because I can not underdand detailed information of 2 peaple at the same time
Scene_5_Grocery_Shopping.F. Why Timing Text: Because then I don't nead to hear about the offer that maybe I would like to buy

Scene_3_Cooking_Dinner.G. Why Text: Version 1, because the others are quite difficult to notice, especially when distracted with cooking
Scene_3_Cooking_Dinner.G. Why Timing Text: If the podcast is paused, I can focus appropriately on the notification and would then like to receive information about sender and content as well, since it’s urgent

Scene_3_Cooking_Dinner.G. Why Text: the smallest ping is enough. i don't need an extra device that reads out the sender and/or the message to me when i am in the middle of something
Scene_3_Cooking_Dinner.G. Why Timing Text: i don't need to be a slave to my phone; i am checking it all the time anyway--why do i need additional auditory stimulus to check it EVEN MORE than i already do????

Scene_3_Cooking_Dinner.G. Why Text: It would be hard to differentiate between the podcast and the notification.
Scene_3_Cooking_Dinner.G. Why Timing Text: Under the condition I described, it would be perfectly fine to listen to and understand the notification; then I would prefer to hear the whole thing.

Scene_3_Cooking_Dinner.G. Why Text: In dem Szenario war ich auf den Podcast konzentriert und bereits durch das Kochen abgelenkt. Sowohl Version 2 als auch Version 3 hätten mich ganz vom Podcast abgelenkt. Ich hätte zurückspringen müssen, um dem Gespräch weiter zu folgen. Version 1 hat meine Aufmerksamkeit kaum vom Podcast abgelenkt. Um die Nachricht zu lesen und ggf. zu beantworten, hätte ich das Handy zu einem günstigen Zeitpunkt aufnehmen und den Podcast stoppen können. Version 2 ist komplett mit dem Podcast "verschmolzen", sodass ich nicht mehr zwischen beiden unterscheiden konnte. Insbesondere habe ich auch den Absender der Nachricht nicht verstehen können. Gegenüber Version 1 hätte mir Version 2 daher schon gar keinen Mehrnutzen gegeben. Vielmehr wäre sie nur störender gewesen. Version 3 war ausschließlich störend. Ich habe weder Absender und Inhalt der Nachricht verstanden noch dem Podcast folgen können, da beide parallel liefen. Somit wiederum keinerlei Mehrnutzen gegenüber Version 1.
Scene_3_Cooking_Dinner.G. Why Timing Text: Wenn ich weder auf das Kochen noch auf den Podcast konzentriert bin, werde ich durch  Benachrichtigungen nicht abgelenkt. In diesem Fall würde ich ein Mehr an Information (Absender und Inhalt der Nachricht wie in Version 3) gegenüber einer kürzeren Benachrichtigung, aufgrund derer ich die Wichtigkeit und Dringlichkeit der Nachricht nicht final einschätzen kann (Version 1 und 2), bevorzugen.
I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message

Scene_4_Study_Coffee_Shop.H. Why Text: Ich finde dieses 'Ding' schon äußerst hilfreich. In Version 2 und 3 gab es diesmal kein 'Ding' vorweg. Das fand ich nicht so gut, um die Dinge im Kopf auch zu separieren.
i don't want to be distracted when i am studying
Scene_4_Study_Coffee_Shop.H. Why Timing Text: don't need audio notification at all for messages, especially when studying. i see them when i see them.

Scene_4_Study_Coffee_Shop.H. Why Text: If I am working on something / studying, then I need to be able to focus on that.
Scene_4_Study_Coffee_Shop.H. Why Timing Text: It would again (like in the meeting scenario) be ideal to be able to just get the notification that something happend while I was focussed, but then I get to check myself instead of having it being read out to me.

Scene_4_Study_Coffee_Shop.H. Why Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message
Scene_4_Study_Coffee_Shop.H. Why Timing Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message but if it was important I'd wanna know what happened

Scene_8_Quiet_Friend_Over.I. Why Text: the idea of me being privately distracted by notifications that my friend can't also hear feels disingenuous and weird
Scene_8_Quiet_Friend_Over.I. Why Timing Text: i always keep my phone on silent mode when with friends

Scene_8_Quiet_Friend_Over.I. Why Timing Text: I dont want to be interrupted by this kind of message
